title: Offhand Visible
description: Always see your offhand, even when empty
body:
> Offhand Visible is a client-side mod that makes your offhand always visible in first-person view, even when the offhand slot is empty.
>
> In vanilla Minecraft, your left hand disappears when you're not holding anything in it. This mod fixes that by rendering your arm at all times, giving you a more immersive and realistic first-person experience.
>
> Features:
> - Empty offhand is always visible
> - Easy toggle in Skin Customization menu
> - Lightweight and performance-friendly
> - Supports 40+ languages including English, Russian, German, French, Spanish, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and many more!
